name: Yu Group PLC
summary: Y√É¬º Group PLC, through its subsidiaries, supplies energy and utility solutions to small and medium-sized enterprises, and corporate customers in the United Kingdom. It also provides electric vehicle charge points; meter installations to connect properties under construction; and energy insights and advice services.
